Notice Of Motion For Spoliation
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SANDRA RANGEL'S Motion For Spoliation.

Motion for spoliation sanctions DENIED. The admissible evidence - from Nilab Nawabi - supports a finding that Defendant undertook a diligent search and reasonable inquiry and produced all responsive documents.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Deft'S Request For Production Of Docs, Set One
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HEALTHRIGHT 360'S Motion To Compel Pltf's Further Responses To Deft's Request For Production Of Docs, Set One.

Motion to compel DENIED. According to the opposition, which is not rebutted in a timely filed reply, Plaintiff produced the requested documents.

Prevailing party to send proposed order tracking the adopted ruling of the court and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2021 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. WENDY H. CHAU, Esq. of Law Offices of Wendy H. Chau (Tel: 415-539-6116) for plaintiff;
Atty. ANTHONY C. OCEGUERA, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 916-564-5400) for defendant Healthright 360.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HEALTHRIGHT 360'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Healthright 360 Foundation's demurrer to Plaintiff Sandra Rangel's second cause of action in the first amended complaint for vicarious liability is overruled.

(See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
